title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 7 - Moving (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming course taught by David J. Malan and Brian Yu. Chapter 7 covers "Moving" and introduces artificial intelligence concepts. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This CS50 session, taught by Brian Yu, is Chapter 7 ("Moving") of Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming course led by David J. Malan and Brian Yu. The chapter introduces artificial intelligence concepts, including generative AI, within the broader context of computer science education. The recording is live and unedited, and the course is offered through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare.
